My Dinner Decider
Enter your license key to get started.
You'll find it in your Gumroad receipt or order confirmation.
Purchased on Etsy or Gumroad?
Your key is in your order confirmation email.
🍽️
My Dinner Decider
Simple ingredients, easy instructions, tasty meals — every night of the week, in 45 minutes or less. Let's take 60 seconds to show you how it works.
🥦
Pick Your Ingredients
Tap up to 7 ingredients from the grid, or type one in the "Add an ingredient" box — it'll suggest matching ingredients as you type so you always pick the right one. Mix proteins, veggies, grains, and pantry items. 400+ recipes matched instantly.
⏱️
Filter by Diet & Time
Set dietary filters — vegetarian, gluten-free, dairy-free, or nut-free. Filter by cook time — under 15, 30, or 45 minutes. Every single recipe in here is quick and uncomplicated.
🔒
Nothing Else in the House?
By default, recipes assume you have a few basics on hand — olive oil, salt, pepper, and common spices. If you truly have only what you've selected and nothing else, flip the "Use only what's selected here" toggle. It will only show recipes that need no other ingredients at all.
✨
Pick Your Dinner
Hit Find My Dinners and you'll see your top matches. Pick one to open the full recipe. Rate it with the ⭐ stars and it'll rise to the top next time. Save any recipe to your Favorites with ☆, or 🖨️ Print it for the kitchen.
💡 For PDF saving and printing to work, make sure your browser allows pop-ups for this page.
📅
Plan Your Whole Week
Save up to 5 dinners to your weekly plan. Changed your mind? Drag meals between nights to swap them around. Then tap Generate Shopping List — view it grouped by category or by meal, copy it, and go. Or hit 🎲 Surprise Me to let us decide tonight!
🧒
Feeding Little Ones?
Tap the 🧒 Kids Dinner button — no ingredient selection needed. It instantly picks a 15-minute, kid-approved meal with simple familiar flavors that little ones will actually eat. Perfect for those nights when your mental energy is completely gone.
👋
Hey, I'm Adam W.
I built this because my family needed it. I'm a working dad with two busy kiddos and a wife — we're both juggling careers and never seemed to have the mental space to figure out dinner at the end of a long day.

I hope this makes dinner a little less stressful — and a little more delicious — for your family too.

Now let's decide what's for dinner. 🍽️
Proteins
Vegetables
Grains & Starches

Thanks for your purchase!
Let's decide what's for dinner.
.time-toggle:hover { border-color: var(--sage); color: var(--sage); } .time-toggle.active { background: var(--sage); border-color: var(--sage); color: white; } /* ── ONBOARDING ── */ .onboard-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 500; display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: center; } .onboard-overlay::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: rgba(20,16,12,0.82); -webkit- pointer-events: none; } .onboard-sheet { position: relative; z-index: 1; background: var(--cream); border-radius: 26px 26px 0 0; width: 100%; max-width: 600px; max-height: 90vh; overflow-y: auto; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; padding: 28px 24px max(36px, env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 36px)); animation: slideUp 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .onboard-slides { overflow: hidden; } .onboard-slide { display: none; } .onboard-slide.active { display: block; } .onboard-emoji { font-size: 3rem; display: block; margin-bottom: 14px; text-align: center; } .onboard-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.7rem; font-weight: 700; text-align: center; line-height: 1.15; margin-bottom: 10px; } .onboard-title span { color: var(--terracotta-light); font-style: italic; } .onboard-body { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--charcoal-light); line-height: 1.65; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 24px; } .onboard-dots { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 20px; } .onboard-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--cream-dark); transition: background 0.2s; } .onboard-dot.active { background: var(--terracotta); width: 20px; border-radius: 4px; } .onboard-next { width: 100%; padding: 14px; background: var(--terracotta); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 14px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.18s; margin-bottom: 8px; touch-action: manipulation; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; } .onboard-next:hover { background: var(--terracotta-light); } .onboard-skip { width: 100%; padding: 8px; background: none; border: none; color: var(--charcoal-light); font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; cursor: pointer; touch-action: manipulation; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; } .onboard-skip:hover { color: var(--charcoal); } main { max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 18px 14px; } .category-section { margin-bottom: 22px; } .category-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; font-style: italic; color: var(--charcoal-light); margin-bottom: 9px; padding-left: 2px; letter-spacing: 0.03em; } .ingredient-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 8px; } .ingredient-tile { position: relative; background: var(--white); border: 2px solid transparent; border-radius: 12px; padding: 11px 7px 10px; text-align: center; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.17s ease; box-shadow: var(--shadow); user-select: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; } .ingredient-tile:hover:not(.disabled) { box-shadow: var(--shadow-hover); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ingredient-tile.selected { border-color: var(--terracotta); background: #FDF3EE; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(196,98,45,0.18); } .ingredient-tile.disabled { opacity: 0.38; cursor: not-allowed; } .tile-check { position: absolute; top: 5px; right: 5px; width: 15px; height: 15px; background: var(--terracotta); border-radius: 50%; display: none; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .tile-check::after { content: '✓'; color: white; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 700; } .ingredient-tile.selected .tile-check { display: flex; } .tile-emoji { font-size: 1.55rem; display: block; margin-bottom: 3px; line-height: 1; } .tile-name { font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--charcoal); line-height: 1.25; } .cta-container { position: fixed; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; padding: 14px 16px max(20px, env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 20px)); background: linear-gradient(to top, var(--cream) 65%, transparent); z-index: 100; transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .cta-container.collapsed { transform: translateY(calc(100% - 36px)); } .cta-toggle { width: 48px; height: 28px; background: var(--cream); border: 1.5px solid #DDD; border-radius: 20px 20px 0 0; border-bottom: none; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; margin: 0 auto -1px; position: relative; z-index: 1; box-shadow: 0 -2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); } .cta-toggle-arrow { font-size: 0.75rem; transition: transform 0.3s; color: var(--charcoal-light); } .cta-container.collapsed .cta-toggle-arrow { transform: rotate(180deg); } .cta-btn { width: 100%; max-width: 600px; display: block; margin: 0 auto; background: var(--terracotta); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 14px; padding: 15px 24px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; box-shadow: 0 5px 22px rgba(196,98,45,0.38); letter-spacing: 0.01em; } .cta-btn:hover:not(:disabled) { background: var(--terracotta-light); transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 7px 28px rgba(196,98,45,0.48); } .cta-btn:disabled { background: #BEBEBE; box-shadow: none; cursor: not-allowed; } .modal-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(30,25,20,0.65); z-index: 200; display: none; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: center; } .modal-overlay.active { display: flex; } .modal { position: relative; background: var(--cream); border-radius: 22px 22px 0 0; width: 100%; max-width: 600px; max-height: 91vh; overflow-y: auto; padding: 10px 18px 44px; animation: slideUp 0.38s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } @keyframes slideUp { from { transform: translateY(100%); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; } } @keyframes slideDown { from { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; } to { transform: translateY(60px); opacity: 0; } } /* ── HEARTS ANIMATION ── */ .heart-burst { position: fixed; pointer-events: none; z-index: 9999; font-size: 1.4rem; animation: heartFloat 0.28s ease-out forwards; } .star-burst { position: fixed; pointer-events: none; z-index: 9999; animation: starFloat 0.6s ease-out forwards; } @keyframes starFloat { 0% { transform: translateY(0) rotate(0deg) scale(0.4); opacity: 1; } 60% { transform: translateY(-50px) rotate(180deg) scale(1.1); opacity: 0.9; } 100% { transform: translateY(-80px) rotate(360deg) scale(0.7); opacity: 0; } } @keyframes heartFloat { 0% { transform: translateY(0) scale(0.5); opacity: 1; } 60% { transform: translateY(-35px) scale(1.05); opacity: 0.9; } 100% { transform: translateY(-55px) scale(0.8); opacity: 0; } } .modal-handle { width: 36px; height: 4px; background: #D8D2C8; border-radius: 2px; margin: 10px auto 16px; } .close-btn { position: absolute; top: 14px; right: 14px; background: var(--cream-dark); border: none; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 50%; font-size: 0.8rem; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: var(--charcoal-light); transition: background 0.18s; } .close-btn:hover { background: #DDD; } .modal-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.55rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 2px; } .modal-subtitle { font-size: 0.76rem; color: var(--charcoal-light); margin-bottom: 18px; display: flex; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 4px; } .recipe-card { background: var(--white); border-radius: 16px; padding: 18px 16px; margin-bottom: 14px; box-shadow: var(--shadow); } .recipe-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 8px; gap: 10px; } .recipe-name { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; } .recipe-meta { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-end; gap: 4px; flex-shrink: 0; } .recipe-time { background: var(--sage-light); color: var(--sage); border-radius: 20px; padding: 3px 10px; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; } .recipe-cuisine { background: var(--cream-dark); color: var(--charcoal-light); border-radius: 20px; padding: 3px 10px; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; } .recipe-description { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--charcoal-light); line-height: 1.55; margin-bottom: 12px; } .recipe-section-title { font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--terracotta); margin-bottom: 6px; margin-top: 10px; } .recipe-ingredients { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 5px; } .recipe-ingredients li { background: var(--cream-dark); border-radius: 7px; padding: 3px 9px; font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--charcoal); } .recipe-ingredients li.matched { background: #FDF3EE; color: var(--terracotta); border: 1px solid rgba(196,98,45,0.25); } .recipe-steps { list-style: none; counter-reset: steps; margin-top: 4px; } .recipe-steps li { counter-increment: steps; display: flex; gap: 9px; align-items: flex-start; font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--charcoal); line-height: 1.55; margin-bottom: 7px; } .recipe-steps li::before { content: counter(steps); background: var(--terracotta); color: white; min-width: 19px; height: 19px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 700; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 2px; } .match-score { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; background: var(--sage-light); color: var(--sage); border-radius: 20px; padding: 3px 9px; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 6px; } .pantry-note { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--charcoal-light); background: #F7F4EF; border-radius: 8px; padding: 7px 10px; margin-bottom: 10px; line-height: 1.5; } .pantry-note strong { color: var(--charcoal); } .no-results { text-align: center; padding: 40px 20px; } .no-results p { color: var(--charcoal-light); font-size: 0.88rem; line-height: 1.6; } .no-results .big { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.2rem; color: var(--charcoal); display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; } .affiliate-section { margin-top: 14px; padding-top: 12px; border-top: 1px solid var(--cream-dark); } .affiliate-label { font-size: 0.68rem; color: var(--charcoal-light); text-align: center; margin-bottom: 8px; } .affiliate-buttons { display: flex; gap: 7px; } .affiliate-btn { flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 4px; padding: 8px 6px; border-radius: 9px; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; border: none; transition: all 0.17s; } .affiliate-btn:hover { filter: brightness(1.1); transform: translateY(-1px); } .affiliate-btn.instacart { background: #F8A31F; color: white; } .affiliate-btn.walmart { background: #0071CE; color: white; } .affiliate-btn.amazon { background: #FF9900; color: #111; } /* ── TILE STAGGER ANIMATION ── */ @keyframes tileIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(14px) scale(0.95); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); } } .ingredient-tile { animation: tileIn 0.35s ease both; } /* ── STAR RATING ── */ .star-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; margin-top: 12px; padding-top: 10px; border-top: 1px solid var(--cream-dark); } .star-label { font-size: 0.68rem; color: var(--charcoal-light); } .stars { display: flex; gap: 2px; } .star { font-size: 1.1rem; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.15s; line-height: 1; filter: grayscale(1) opacity(0.35); } .star:hover, .star.lit { filter: none; transform: scale(1.2); } .star.lit { transform: scale(1); } .last-cooked { font-size: 0.65rem; color: var(--charcoal-light); margin-left: auto; font-style: italic; } /* ── CONFETTI ── */ .confetti-piece { position: fixed; pointer-events: none; z-index: 9999; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 2px; animation: confettiFall 1.1s ease-out forwards; } @keyframes confettiFall { 0% { transform: translateY(0) rotate(0deg) scale(1); opacity: 1; } 100% { transform: translateY(160px) rotate(540deg) scale(0.5); opacity: 0; } } /* ── CREDIT ── */ .app-credit { text-align: center; padding: 18px 0 6px; font-size: 0.68rem; color: #CCC; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; } .app-credit span { color: #E8845A; } .strict-switch { position: relative; width: 32px; height: 18px; flex-shrink: 0; } .strict-switch input { opacity: 0; width: 0; height: 0; } .strict-slider { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: #CCC; border-radius: 18px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .strict-slider:before { content: ''; position: absolute; width: 12px; height: 12px; left: 3px; top: 3px; background: white; border-radius: 50%; transition: transform 0.2s; } .strict-switch input:checked + .strict-slider { background: var(--terracotta); } .strict-switch input:checked + .strict-slider:before { transform: translateX(14px); } .strict-inline { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; margin-left: 6px; padding-left: 10px; border-left: 1px solid rgba(44,44,44,0.12); flex-shrink: 0; } .strict-inline-label { font-size: 0.68rem; color: var(--charcoal-light); white-space: nowrap; } /* ── START FRESH FLOAT BUTTON ── */ #clearBtn { position: fixed; right: 20px; z-index: 101; display: none; background: var(--charcoal); color: var(--cream); border: none; border-radius: 50px; padding: 14px 22px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.92rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; touch-action: manipulation; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; transition: all 0.2s; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(44,44,44,0.22); white-space: nowrap; } #clearBtn:hover { background: var(--terracotta); transform: scale(1.04); } #clearBtn:active { transform: scale(0.97); } /* ── LICENSE GATE ── */ .license-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: var(--charcoal); z-index: 1000; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 24px; } .license-sheet { background: var(--cream); border-radius: 24px; width: 100%; max-width: 420px; padding: 40px 32px 36px; text-align: center; box-shadow: 0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); } .license-emoji { font-size: 3rem; display: block; margin-bottom: 16px; } .license-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.9rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 8px; } .license-title span { color: var(--terracotta-light); font-style: italic; } .license-sub { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--charcoal-light); line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 28px; } .license-input { width: 100%; padding: 14px 16px; border: 2px solid var(--cream-dark); border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; text-align: center; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--charcoal); background: var(--white); outline: none; transition: border-color 0.18s; margin-bottom: 12px; } .license-input:focus { border-color: var(--terracotta); } .license-input.error { border-color: #E53E3E; animation: shake 0.3s ease; } .license-btn { width: 100%; padding: 14px; background: var(--terracotta); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.18s; touch-action: manipulation; } .license-btn:hover { background: var(--terracotta-light); } .license-error { font-size: 0.78rem; color: #E53E3E; margin-bottom: 12px; min-height: 18px; } .license-footer { font-size: 0.72rem; color: #CCC; margin-top: 20px; line-height: 1.5; } @keyframes shake { 0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)} 25%{transform:translateX(-6px)} 75%{transform:translateX(6px)} } /* ── THANKS TOAST ── */ .thanks-toast { position: fixed; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.8); z-index: 2000; background: var(--charcoal); color: var(--cream); border-radius: 20px; padding: 24px 36px; text-align: center; pointer-events: none; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.3s, transform 0.3s; box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } .thanks-toast.show { opacity: 1; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); } .thanks-toast .toast-emoji { font-size: 2.4rem; display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; } .thanks-toast .toast-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--cream); } .thanks-toast .toast-sub { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--charcoal-light); margin-top: 4px; } /* ── CUSTOM INGREDIENT ── */ .custom-section { padding: 4px 16px 16px; } .custom-input-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; } .custom-input { flex: 1; border: 1.5px dashed #CCC; border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 14px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; background: white; color: var(--charcoal); outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .custom-input:focus { border-color: var(--terracotta); } .custom-input::placeholder { color: #BBB; } .suggestion-item { padding: 10px 14px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--charcoal); cursor: pointer; border-radius: 8px; margin: 2px 4px; } .suggestion-item:hover, .suggestion-active { background: #FDF3EE; color: var(--terracotta); } .custom-add-btn { background: var(--charcoal); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 16px; font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 0.2s; } .custom-add-btn:hover { background: var(--terracotta); } .custom-pills { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; margin-top: 8px; } .custom-pill { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; background: var(--charcoal); color: white; border-radius: 20px; padding: 4px 10px 4px 12px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; } .custom-pill-remove { background: none; border: none; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.9rem; padding: 0; line-height: 1; } .custom-pill-remove:hover { color: white; } /* ── FAVORITES ── */ .fav-btn { background: none; border: none; font-size: 1.3rem; cursor: pointer; padding: 4px 6px; line-height: 1; transition: transform 0.2s; color: #CCC; } .fav-btn.saved { color: #E8A020; } .fav-btn:active { transform: scale(1.3); } .fav-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(30,25,20,0.75); z-index: 300; display: none; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: center; } .fav-overlay.active { display: flex; } .fav-sheet { position: relative; background: var(--cream); border-radius: 22px 22px 0 0; width: 100%; max-width: 600px; max-height: 88vh; overflow-y: auto; padding: 10px 18px 36px; animation: slideUp 0.38s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .fav-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.45rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 4px; } .fav-empty { text-align: center; color: var(--charcoal-light); font-size: 0.85rem; padding: 40px 0; } .fav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--cream-dark); } .fav-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; } .fav-item-name { flex: 1; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--charcoal); } .fav-item-meta { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--charcoal-light); margin-top: 2px; } .fav-item-actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; } .fav-view-btn { background: none; border: 1.5px solid var(--terracotta); color: var(--terracotta); border-radius: 10px; padding: 5px 10px; font-size: 0.75rem; cursor: pointer; } .fav-add-btn { background: var(--sage); border: none; color: white; border-radius: 10px; padding: 5px 10px; font-size: 0.75rem; cursor: pointer; } .fav-add-btn:disabled { background: #CCC; cursor: not-allowed; } .fav-remove-btn { background: none; border: none; color: #CCC; font-size: 1rem; cursor: pointer; padding: 4px; } /* ── HEART BURST ── */ .heart-burst { position: fixed; pointer-events: none; z-index: 9999; font-size: 1.4rem; animation: heartFloat 0.9s ease-out forwards; } @keyframes heartFloat { 0% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(0.6) rotate(var(--rot)); } 40% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(-60px) scale(1.2) rotate(var(--rot)); } 100% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-120px) scale(0.8) rotate(var(--rot)); } } /* ── PRINT BUTTON ── */ .print-btn { width: 100%; margin-top: 8px; padding: 9px; border: 1.5px solid #DDD; background: transparent; color: var(--charcoal-light); border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 400; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.18s; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 5px; } .print-btn:hover { border-color: var(--charcoal); color: var(--charcoal); background: var(--cream-dark); } /* ── SEND TO PARTNER ── */ .partner-btn { width: 100%; margin-top: 8px; padding: 9px; border: 1.5px solid #C2DAC8; background: transparent; color: var(--sage); border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 400; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.18s; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 5px; } .partner-btn:hover { border-color: var(--sage); background: #F0F6F2; } /* ── CHOICE CARDS ── */ .choice-prompt { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--charcoal-light); margin-bottom: 14px; } .choice-card { background: var(--white); border: 2px solid transparent; border-radius: 16px; padding: 16px; margin-bottom: 10px; box-shadow: var(--shadow); cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s ease; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; } .choice-card:hover { border-color: var(--terracotta-light); box-shadow: var(--shadow-hover); transform: translateY(-1px); } .choice-card:active { transform: scale(0.99); } .choice-card-emoji { font-size: 2rem; flex-shrink: 0; } .choice-card-info { flex: 1; } .choice-card-name { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; margin-bottom: 5px; } .choice-card-meta { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 5px; } .choice-card-arrow { color: #CCC; font-size: 1.1rem; flex-shrink: 0; transition: color 0.18s; } .choice-card:hover .choice-card-arrow { color: var(--terracotta); } /* ── COOKING VIEW ── */ .back-btn { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; background: none; border: none; color: var(--charcoal-light); font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; cursor: pointer; padding: 0 0 14px 0; transition: color 0.18s; } .back-btn:hover { color: var(--terracotta); } /* ── PRINT STYLES ── */ @page { margin: 0.6in; } @media print { body > *:not(#printArea) { display: none !important; } html, body { height: auto !important; min-height: 0 !important; overflow: visible !important; margin: 0 !important; padding: 0 !important; padding-bottom: 0 !important; background: white !important; } body > *:not(#printArea) { display: none !important; } #printArea { display: block !important; position: static !important; background: white !important; font-family: Georgia, serif; color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 11pt; line-height: 1.6; height: auto !important; min-height: 0 !important; max-height: none !important; overflow: visible !important; padding-bottom: 0 !important; margin-bottom: 0 !important; } #printArea .pr-logo { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 8pt; color: #BBB; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 14px; } #printArea .pr-name { font-size: 26pt; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 6px; color: #1a1a1a; } #printArea .pr-meta { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt; color: #888; margin-bottom: 10px; } #printArea .pr-divider { border: none; border-top: 2px solid #C4622D; margin: 14px 0; } #printArea .pr-desc { font-size: 11pt; color: #555; font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 18px; line-height: 1.6; } #printArea .pr-section { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 7.5pt; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #C4622D; margin: 20px 0 8px; } #printArea .pr-ingredients { list-style: none; padding: 0; columns: 2; gap: 24px; margin-bottom: 6px; } #printArea .pr-ingredients li { font-size: 10.5pt; padding: 3px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #F0F0F0; break-inside: avoid; } #printArea .pr-steps { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; } #printArea .pr-steps li { display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 14px; font-size: 11pt; line-height: 1.6; break-inside: avoid; } #printArea .pr-step-num { background: #C4622D; color: white; border-radius: 50%; width: 24px; height: 24px; min-width: 24px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt; font-weight: 700; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 2px; -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; print-color-adjust: exact; } #printArea .pr-footer { margin-top: 32px; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 8pt; color: #BBB; border-top: 1px solid #EEE; padding-top: 10px; } } @media (min-width: 480px) { .ingredient-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); } } /* ── KIDS MODE BUTTON ── */ .kids-btn { width: 100%; max-width: 600px; display: block; margin: 8px auto 0; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #F9A825, #F57F17); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 14px; padding: 13px 24px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(249,168,37,0.35); letter-spacing: 0.01em; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; } .kids-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 6px 22px rgba(249,168,37,0.5); filter: brightness(1.05); } .kids-btn:active { transform: scale(0.99); } .surprise-btn { width: 100%; max-width: 600px; display: block; margin: 8px auto 0; background: transparent; color: var(--charcoal-light); border: 1.5px dashed #CCC; border-radius: 14px; padding: 10px 24px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 400; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; letter-spacing: 0.01em; } .surprise-btn:hover { border-color: var(--terracotta-light); color: var(--terracotta); background: #FDF3EE; } /* ── SEASON BADGE ── */ .season-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 3px; border-radius: 20px; padding: 2px 8px; font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 500; margin-left: 5px; } .season-spring { background: #E8F5E3; color: #4A7C3F; } .season-summer { background: #FFF3CD; color: #8B6914; } .season-fall { background: #FDEBD0; color: #784212; } .season-winter { background: #EAF2FB; color: #1A5276; } /* ── SERVES BADGE ── */ .serves-badge { background: var(--cream-dark); color: var(--charcoal-light); border-radius: 20px; padding: 3px 10px; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; } /* ── SAVE TO WEEK BUTTON ── */ .save-week-btn { width: 100%; margin-top: 10px; padding: 10px; border: 1.5px solid var(--sage); background: transparent; color: var(--sage); border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.18s; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 5px; } .save-week-btn:hover:not(:disabled) { background: var(--sage); color: white; } .save-week-btn:disabled { border-color: #CCC; color: #CCC; cursor: default; } .save-week-btn.saved { background: var(--sage); color: white; border-color: var(--sage); cursor: pointer; } .save-week-btn.saved:hover { background: #c0392b; border-color: #c0392b; } /* ── FLOATING WEEK BUTTON ── */ .week-float { position: fixed; bottom: 110px; right: 16px; z-index: 150; background: var(--sage); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 50px; padding: 10px 16px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(74,124,89,0.4); transition: all 0.2s; display: none; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .week-float.visible { display: flex; } .week-float:hover { background: #3a6348; transform: translateY(-2px); } .week-float .wf-count { background: white; color: var(--sage); border-radius: 50%; width: 18px; height: 18px; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 700; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } /* ── WEEK PLANNER MODAL ── */ .planner-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(30,25,20,0.65); z-index: 250; display: none; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: center; } .planner-overlay.active { display: flex; } .planner-sheet { position: relative; background: var(--cream); border-radius: 22px 22px 0 0; width: 100%; max-width: 600px; max-height: 85vh; overflow-y: auto; padding: 10px 18px 36px; animation: slideUp 0.38s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .planner-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.45rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 4px; } .planner-sub { font-size: 0.74rem; color: var(--charcoal-light); margin-bottom: 18px; } .meal-slot { background: var(--white); border-radius: 12px; padding: 13px 14px; margin-bottom: 9px; box-shadow: var(--shadow); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; transition: all 0.18s; } .meal-slot[draggable="true"] { cursor: grab; } .meal-slot[draggable="true"]:active { cursor: grabbing; } .meal-slot.dragging { opacity: 0.4; transform: scale(0.98); } .meal-slot.drag-over { border: 2px dashed var(--terracotta); background: #FDF3EE; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(196,98,45,0.18); } .drag-hint { font-size: 0.68rem; color: #CCC; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.02em; } .meal-slot-night { font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--terracotta); min-width: 48px; } .meal-slot-info { flex: 1; } .meal-slot-name { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; } .meal-slot-meta { font-size: 0.68rem; color: var(--charcoal-light); margin-top: 2px; } .meal-slot-empty { color: #BBB; font-size: 0.8rem; font-style: italic; } .meal-slot-remove { background: none; border: none; color: #CCC; font-size: 1rem; cursor: pointer; padding: 4px; transition: color 0.15s; flex-shrink: 0; } .meal-slot-remove:hover { color: var(--terracotta); } .planner-actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-top: 14px; } .shop-list-btn { flex: 1; padding: 13px; background: var(--terracotta); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.18s; } .shop-list-btn:hover { background: var(--terracotta-light); } .shop-list-btn:disabled { background: #CCC; cursor: not-allowed; } .clear-week-btn { padding: 13px 18px; background: transparent; border: 1.5px solid #DDD; color: var(--charcoal-light); border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.82rem; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.18s; } .clear-week-btn:hover { border-color: var(--terracotta); color: var(--terracotta); } /* ── SHOPPING LIST MODAL ── */ .shoplist-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(30,25,20,0.75); z-index: 300; display: none; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: center; } .shoplist-overlay.active { display: flex; } .shoplist-sheet { position: relative; background: var(--cream); border-radius: 22px 22px 0 0; width: 100%; max-width: 600px; max-height: 88vh; overflow-y: auto; padding: 10px 18px 36px; animation: slideUp 0.38s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .shoplist-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.45rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 2px; } .shoplist-sub { font-size: 0.74rem; color: var(--charcoal-light); margin-bottom: 18px; } .shoplist-group { margin-bottom: 16px; } .shoplist-group-title { font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--terracotta); margin-bottom: 7px; } .shoplist-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 7px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--cream-dark); font-size: 0.82rem; } .shoplist-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; } .shoplist-check { width: 16px; height: 16px; border: 2px solid #CCC; border-radius: 4px; flex-shrink: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; } .shoplist-item.checked .shoplist-check { background: var(--sage); border-color: var(--sage); } .shoplist-item.checked span { text-decoration: line-through; color: #AAA; } .copy-btn { width: 100%; margin-top: 14px; padding: 13px; background: var(--charcoal); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.18s; } .copy-btn:hover { background: var(--terracotta); } .copy-btn.copied { background: var(--sage); }

My Dinner Decider

Simple ingredients, easy instructions, tasty meals.

🍽️
My Dinner Decider
Enter your license key to get started.
You'll find it in your Gumroad receipt or order confirmation.
Purchased on Etsy or Gumroad?
Your key is in your order confirmation email.
🍽️
My Dinner Decider
Simple ingredients, easy instructions, tasty meals — every night of the week, in 45 minutes or less. Let's take 60 seconds to show you how it works.
🥦
Pick Your Ingredients
Tap up to 7 ingredients from the grid, or type one in the "Add an ingredient" box — it'll suggest matching ingredients as you type so you always pick the right one. Mix proteins, veggies, grains, and pantry items. 400+ recipes matched instantly.
⏱️
Filter by Diet & Time
Set dietary filters — vegetarian, gluten-free, dairy-free, or nut-free. Filter by cook time — under 15, 30, or 45 minutes. Every single recipe in here is quick and uncomplicated.
🔒
Nothing Else in the House?
By default, recipes assume you have a few basics on hand — olive oil, salt, pepper, and common spices. If you truly have only what you've selected and nothing else, flip the "Use only what's selected here" toggle. It will only show recipes that need no other ingredients at all.
✨
Pick Your Dinner
Hit Find My Dinners and you'll see your top matches. Pick one to open the full recipe. Rate it with the ⭐ stars and it'll rise to the top next time. Save any recipe to your Favorites with ☆, or 🖨️ Print it for the kitchen.
💡 For PDF saving and printing to work, make sure your browser allows pop-ups for this page.
📅
Plan Your Whole Week
Save up to 5 dinners to your weekly plan. Changed your mind? Drag meals between nights to swap them around. Then tap Generate Shopping List — view it grouped by category or by meal, copy it, and go. Or hit 🎲 Surprise Me to let us decide tonight!
🧒
Feeding Little Ones?
Tap the 🧒 Kids Dinner button — no ingredient selection needed. It instantly picks a 15-minute, kid-approved meal with simple familiar flavors that little ones will actually eat. Perfect for those nights when your mental energy is completely gone.
👋
Hey, I'm Adam W.
I built this because my family needed it. I'm a working dad with two busy kiddos and a wife — we're both juggling careers and never seemed to have the mental space to figure out dinner at the end of a long day.

I hope this makes dinner a little less stressful — and a little more delicious — for your family too.

Now let's decide what's for dinner. 🍽️
